# INTENT

## User Request

Add account settings billing management so clients can manage or cancel billing through Polar.

## Requested Outcome

Authenticated users should have an account/billing page that shows account details, current plan, and a Manage billing button that opens Polar's customer portal.

## Constraints

- Implement the approved MVP only.
- Use Polar customer portal/session instead of building local card/cancellation management.
- Preserve existing checkout and entitlement behavior.

## Open Questions

- None for this pass.
